title: Oritech Things
description: Oritech Things is an open-source tech mod (currently for Minecraft 1.21) with the goal to add additional things for Oritech Mods
body:
Oritech Things

 

Oritech Things is an open-source tech mod (currently for Minecraft 1.21) with the goal to add additional things for Oritech Mods ( 1.12.0 and above ) !!!
(0.14.0 and above from 0.0.20 )
(0.15.0 and above from 0.0.21 )
(0.17.0 and above from 0.0.23 Now with chinese traslations !)
0.0.25 russian traslations !
0.0.26 cross dimensional Drone port!
0.0.27 accelerator magnetic field and motor addons compatibility


0.0.33 fix Target and Advanced Target server crash


0.0.34 Particle Accelerator Speed Sensor update - Thanks to DevDyna


0.0.36 brazilian traslations


0.0.37 Auto mode in Particle Accelerator Speed Sensor


0.0.38 Better GUI for Particle Accelerator Speed Sensor and Magnetic Field core and addons

Features include ✨

  • Speed Addons Tiered from 2 to 9
  • Efficiency Addons Tiered from 2 to 9
  • Efficient Speed Addons Tiered from 2 to 9 (combines Speed and Efficiency in one addons)
  • Processing Addons Tiered from 2 to 9
  • Capacitor Addons Tiered from 2 to 9
  • Acceptor Addons Tiered from 2 to 9

  • Exo JetPack it grants you creative flight consuming enery\turbo fuel
  • Advanced Target Designator - used to store the position of a Particle Accelerator
  • Particle Accelerator Speed Control - a new Block that emits a redstone signal 15 when the accelarator speed is greater than the provided value
  • Infested Amethyst Block - now in Geode some of the Amethyst Block are replaced with Infested one
  • Amethyst Fish - new mob spawned when Infested Amethyst is broke.
         It can drop fluxite, amethyst shard and with a lesser possibility amethyst block and amethyst budding
  • Frame Placer - a new tool to define and autobuild the Frame Structure for the Destroyer. It automatically
         destroy all the blocks in the area and auto place the frame in perimeter
  • Cross Dimensional Drone + Addon (from 0.0.26): attaching a Cross dimensional addon to a Drone Port you can set a Drone Port destination in another dimension using the Advanced Target Designator
  • Accelerator Linear Motor compatible with Efficiency and Speed addons
  • Accelerator Magnetic Field - a new block that linked to a Particle Accelerator ( with Advanced Target Designator) grants to you the possibility to significantely reduce the size of the particle ring using energy. Efficiency and Capacitor addons are compatible

The following translations are available:

  • English
  • Chinese
  • Russian
  • Brazilian

Credits 🙏

This mod of course has a strong dependency with Oritech mod.


Tiered Addons

These new addons when attached to a machine (or an extender) they emit light ( level 15 ) if they are used.
All the stats can be edited in config but the tooltip inside the Machine ( under addons section is bugged from Oritech)

See the images for stats and recipes

Speed Sensor

We add the item Advanced Target Designator used to store the position of a Particle Accelerator (shift right click)
This will be used to the new block Particle Accelerator Speed Sensor (shift right click).
This can be turn ON\OFF and you can specify a Limit Speed and if check Spess Greater or Lesser
using its GUI

Accepts up to 999999 as Speed

 

Amethyst Fish

 

Frame Placer
